scenarios.title: Single atomic commit with bubbles(024/bug-024-002) prefix satisfies Check 17

linkedTests.function: git log --oneline -1 --format=%s | grep -cE '^bubbles\(024/bug-024-002\):'  # → 1 (evidence captured in BUG report.md Git-Backed Proof block)

git diff --stat HEAD~1 -- docs/smackerel.md specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation/ | head -5; ! git diff --name-only HEAD~1 | grep -E '^(specs/055-|cmd/|internal/|ml/|scripts/|smackerel\.sh|config/|docker-compose|specs/044-per-user-bearer-auth/state\.json|\.github/bubbles/)'  # → evidence captured in BUG report.md commit-discipline subsection

scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: Single atomic commit with subject prefix `bubbles(024/bug-024-002):` lands all changes; commit --name-status confirms zero stray files; all 4 guards exit 0 on parent spec AND BUG packet — Scenario 'SCN-008 Single atomic commit with bubbles(024/bug-024-002) prefix satisfies Check 17'.
